case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $47,793.00 ET AL

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE IN RESPONSE TO A JUDICIAL PETITION FOR FORFEITURE (TRANSACTION ID # 100157804) FILED BY CLAIMANT BOIVIN, JEREMY
DECLARATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON INTERESTED PARTY JEREMY BOIVIN (21-028) (TRANSACTION ID # 67322535) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE (TRANSACTION ID # 100157804) FILED BY CLAIMANT BOIVIN, JEREMY
NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIAN OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $47,793.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION SHALL BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY VALERY NECHAY ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JEREMY BOIVIN: $38,234.40 U.S. CURRENCY. THE FOLLOWING RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11469, ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489: $9,558.60 U.S. CURRENCY. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
